definition:
1. any prominent part , ἀκρ. τοῦ οὔρεος a mountain- peak , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. a cape, promontory , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. the extremity  of anything, ἀκρ. νηός a ship's beak , (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. in plural the extremities of the body, hands and feet, fingers and toes , (Thucydides), etc.; τὰ ἀκρ. τῆς Νίκης her wings , (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
